content.en:
There are currently twenty-five Bone Kings in the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, the weakest one is comparable to the Ancestor of Destruction, the most powerful Bone King and has reached the peak level of the top Ancestor, but it is still not Ye Tian's opponent, if not, it will not be helpless Ye Tian.

At this time, the twenty-five bone kings were all very nervous.

"Everyone, what should I do, the strength of that top ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Domain is too strong, I am afraid that he will soon have the combat power of the Supreme Ancestor, and the Supreme Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Domain is comparable to the Bone Emperor, and if the Bone Emperor wants to forcibly descend here, he will pay a great price. But if we don't care, after a period of time, that top ancestor has refined those bone beads, and after his strength has increased greatly, we can't stop him, and those ancestor-level bone soldiers will be slaughtered by him in large numbers, which will become an opportunity for him to grow. A bone king said.

"At present, there are only three ways, one is to evacuate here, the second is to ask for help, ask a large number of bone kings to guard here, and the third is to let a bone emperor pay some price to guard this place!"

The other Bone King spoke.

"It's impossible to withdraw, don't think about the first way!" the other bone kings said one after another.

Withdraw?

Are you kidding?

What a heavy price they paid in order to establish the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, this is their hope, just like the ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Domain, at this level, many resources of the Dark Forbidden Land are useless to them, there is no way to improve their strength, and it is almost hopeless to improve their combat power.

In the same way, the same is true for the Bone Clan, who must also use the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain to quickly increase their strength.

Because the Bone Sea Forbidden Land was born in the Dark Forbidden Domain, although the rules are different from the Dark Forbidden Domain, because it has been affected, some of the resources born here can have a great effect on them, and if it goes on for a long time, it can still improve some strength.

It's just that they can't resist the rules of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and once they enter the Dark Forbidden Realm, they will definitely die.

But the Dark Forbidden Realm will have great tribulations again and again, just as the realm will also give birth to great tribulations.

At the time of the Great Tribulation, the origin of the Dark Forbidden Domain was chaotic and the rules weakened, and they only needed to pay a certain price to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain and snatch the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain, so as to strengthen the Bone Clan.

Last time, they had broken into the Dark Forbidden Realm and gained great benefits.

The Dark Forbidden Realm is relatively young, and the strength of such a place is very weak, and there are not many ancestors, so they can't compete with them, unless it is another place with a similar background to them, which can threaten them.

The Bone Clan has discovered the Dark Forbidden Realm, which is a great opportunity for the Bone Clan.

Last time, the Bone Clan plundered the resources of the Dark Forbidden Realm and gave birth to several Bone Emperors.

Therefore, how could they give up such a big opportunity?

Even if they paid the price of a large number of bone soldiers, it was impossible for them to give up the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, once they gave it up, they would have no hope of entering the Dark Forbidden Land again, or they would need to pay an even heavier price.

"Then ask for help!"

The Bone Kings decided.

As for letting a Bone Emperor guard this place, this is the last resort, and unless you are in a desperate situation, you will not use such a method.

After all, once this is done, the price paid by the Bone Emperor is too great, not only will his strength plummet, but it will even affect the origin, resulting in the inability to progress for endless years.

Therefore, it is possible to ask some bone kings to guard this place.

Soon.

The Bone Clan sent another twenty Bone Kings, among which there was an extremely powerful Top Bone King, not even weaker than the combat power that Ye Tian had shown before.

The Bone Clan felt that sending so many Bone Kings to guard the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, even if Ye Tian dared to come in again, they would be sure to kill Ye Tian.

......

At this time, Ye Tian was refining bone beads in the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

This time, he obtained a lot of bone beads, and after refining the bone beads, his strength continued to improve.

Nearly a million years have passed, and more than thirty bone bone beads have all been refined by him, making his strength much higher again.

But at this time, Ye Tian felt that his cultivation had not yet reached the limit.

So, Ye Tian continued to refine the two bone beads.

The energy contained in the Bone Soldier Bone Beads is naturally far superior to the Bone Soldier Bone Beads, and the effect of these two Bone Bone Beads is comparable to the more than thirty Bone Soldier Bone Beads.

After all, Ye Tian has refined a lot of bone soldier bone beads, and the effect will naturally be reduced, and he has never refined the bone bone beads, once he refines them, I am afraid that his strength will increase a lot.

At that time, his strength can definitely kill a bone general with one blow, and he can even severely damage a bone king with one blow.

If it was a top ancestor like the Destruction Ancestor, he could kill it in a few moves.

"Refining!"

It took Ye Tian millions of years to completely refine the two bone beads, and his strength also increased a lot.

Without a treasure like a bone bead, Ye Tianguang is useless in absorbing and refining the Silent Annihilation Treasure, and there is no point in penance, unless he can create a more powerful Ultimate Ancestral Technique, or create an Ancestral Technique above the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, otherwise he will not be able to improve his strength through cultivation.

"I still have to fight the idea of bone beads!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian copied the copy body, allowing the copy body to enter the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones again.

When Ye Tian descended on the forbidden land of the Sea of Bone, forty-five bone kings appeared, joining forces to besiege Ye Tian, and a large number of bone generals assisted.

Otherwise, if the forty-five Bone Kings hadn't stopped them, wouldn't they have been able to kill into the lair, and then more bone soldiers would fall, and they might even be damaged by the most important treasure of the Bone Clan, the Gate!

Therefore, a large number of bones will form a formation, which can withstand Ye Tian's attack.

However, they still underestimated Ye Tian's determination.

Ye Tian desperately attacked the bone general, not caring about his injuries at all.

In the end, Ye Tian killed the six bone generals at the cost of being seriously injured and dying, took their bone beads, and brought them out of the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones.

If it was a real top ancestor with Ye Tian's strength, where would he die like this, even if he really wanted to deal with the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, he would definitely combine all the Ancestors to attack the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, instead of using this desperate way.

Only Ye Tian was not worried about the fall of the copy body, so he dared to care so much about his life.

After obtaining the six Bone Bone Beads, Ye Tian began to retreat and refine the Bone Bone Beads, and his strength continued to improve.

At this time, the Bone King of the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones was in a predicament.

They knew very well that the forty-five Bone Kings still couldn't kill Ye Tian quickly.

Of course, they felt that Ye Tian's strength had definitely reached the extreme of the top ancestor, and there was no way to improve it, so they would definitely not be able to break the shackles and become the strongest ancestor even if they obtained the six bone generals.

So, they still didn't ask the Bone Emperor to guard here, but mobilized more than a dozen Bone Kings and brought a Supreme Emperor weapon.

Even the Bone Clan didn't have many supreme emperor weapons, and this time they used one, which can be said to be extremely important to the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

With so many Bone Kings and a Supreme Emperor Weapon, once Ye Tian enters the Bone Sea Forbidden Land again, they can definitely kill Ye Tian.
